white_label_map.note: GetFPV house brand; Li-ion NAV packs use Molicel
Drone frame companies sourcing LiPo packs

chinese_cell_manufacturers.name: Grepow
chinese_cell_manufacturers.sanctions_status: Not on any US sanctions or entity list
chinese_cell_manufacturers.oem_clients_note: OEM/ODM for numerous brands beyond Tattu/Gens Ace

chinese_cell_manufacturers.name: EVE Energy
chinese_cell_manufacturers.scale: 60 GWh gigafactory, 9th largest global EV battery maker

ndaa_ban.note: One of six named Chinese companies banned for DoD procurement

dji_battery_supply_chain.primary_supplier: ATL (Dongguan Amperex Technology Limited) — TDK Corporation (Japan) subsidiary in Dongguan, China
dji_battery_supply_chain.secondary_supplier: SunWoda Electronic (Shenzhen) — confirmed by community teardowns
dji_battery_supply_chain.critical_link: ATL is same TDK subsidiary family as Dongguan Poweramp — the company China ordered to cut off Skydio
dji_battery_supply_chain.byd_clarification: BYD-DJI partnership is vehicle-mounted drone systems, not battery cells

skydio_crisis.trigger: China sanctioned Skydio after US approved $567M Taiwan defense assistance
skydio_crisis.supplier: Dongguan Poweramp Technology Ltd. (TDK subsidiary manufacturing in Dongguan, China)
skydio_crisis.mechanism: China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs directly ordered factory to halt all Skydio operations
impact: Battery rationing from 3 per drone to 1
Alternative supply not expected online until spring 2025

response.ceo_quote_summary: Adam Bry called it 'a clarifying moment'
response.alternative_sourcing: Actively exploring Taiwanese suppliers, no public replacement named as of early 2025

skydio_crisis.strategic_lesson: Even Japanese-owned companies are subject to Chinese government orders when factories sit on Chinese soil
